text: 4583 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ لَمْ يُؤْمِنْ بِكَرَّتِنَا وَ يَسْتَحِلَّ مُتْعَتَنَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4583 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"He is not from us who does not believe in our return (Rajah) and does not consider the temporary marriage (Mutah) lawful."
